title: gentiana vandellioides subsp. vandellioides
intro: Gentiana vandellioides subsp. vandellioides, also known as the Tibetan gentian, is a plant species in the gentian family that is native to the Himalayan regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea, due to the presence of gentiopicroside and other bioactive compounds. The Tibetan gentian has been used in traditional medicine to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, and its health benefits include improving appetite, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Gentiana vandellioides subsp. vandellioides are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
